subject: [PATCH v3 07/16] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch extends three mm paths to treat VM_UFFD_RWP (Read/Write Protected) the same as VM_UFFD_WP (Write Protected). The affected paths are khugepaged, rmap, and GUP. In khugepaged, ranges with VM_UFFD_RWP are protected from collapse. In rmap, unmap batching is capped at 1 for VM_UFFD_RWP to ensure each PTE can be handled individually. In GUP, faults are forced through the userfaultfd path even if FOLL_HONOR_NUMA_FAULT is set, as RWP uses protnone as an access-tracking marker rather than a NUMA hinting indicator.
